purpose: Single machine-readable live Artifex work queue. Historical reports and specialist supporting documents preserve detail but do not define current priority or authorise implementation.
lockedDecisions: Current main is the only implementation baseline unless the user explicitly approves otherwise.
Project Editor is the locked user-facing name; project-manager identifiers are legacy compatibility or migration data only.
Connected project-folder files are the intended authored source of truth only where an app has a verified writable-folder path; localStorage is recovery/draft state.
ZIP and download exports are fallback or backup behaviours unless a current app is explicitly still import/export-only.
Creation Guide owns Blank Starter Project creation; Template Game and Artifacts Adventures are separate later project layers.
Quest Builder owns Quest progression and Quest-scoped dialogue; Puzzle Creator owns self-contained puzzle definitions linked by puzzleId.
Generated synth recipes belong in assets/audio/sfx and register in assets/asset-index.json; do not create an archetypes/sounds system.
Audits and mappings are read-only and do not authorise code changes, file moves or merges.
One app and one concern per implementation pass; do not create new patch, rescue, wrapper or hotfix layers as the default fix route.

completedBaselineChanges.title: Project Editor archive-only cleanup
completedBaselineChanges.result: Archived four confirmed superseded static/bootstrap files; active v0.1.32 CONTRACT runtime unchanged.

completedBaselineChanges.title: Quest Builder archive-only cleanup
completedBaselineChanges.result: Archived six inactive legacy files; retained active older-named CSS and module-config dependencies.

completedBaselineChanges.title: Puzzle Creator archive-only cleanup
completedBaselineChanges.result: Archived two inactive maze patch files; active V1.32 loader route unchanged; app-specific build passed.

completedBaselineChanges.title: Route Hub Effect Editor card to accepted index2 rewrite
completedBaselineChanges.result: Hub now opens apps/effect-editor/index2.html?from=hub; emergency route and index2 implementation were not modified.

tasks.title: Repair Object Inspector and transform ownership
tasks.description: Consolidate current selected-object update ownership so editing the selected ball affects only the ball and editing the selected box affects only the box. Include movement, resize, rotation, skew, aspect lock, wrap-to-image, visual adjustment and non-duplicated inspector-control acceptance checks.

tasks.title: Map missing parity features into accepted index2 baseline
tasks.description: Index2 is accepted as the good rewrite and Hub now routes to it. Perform a read-only map for the three user-identified missing feature areas: rotation random/within-degree/lock-direction controls, orbital control, and convert text to ALL CAPS. Determine existing source behaviour and permanent index2 owning modules before implementation.

tasks.title: Port accepted missing features to index2
tasks.description: After mapping is reviewed, implement only rotation-direction controls, orbital control and ALL CAPS text conversion in permanent index2 owner modules. Keep the old emergency route untouched as reference/rollback and exclude save-contract work and broad redesign.

tasks.title: Reopen Puzzle Creator as first fuller UI-only lane
tasks.description: After a short current-main visual/manual baseline check, permit visual-only work on V1.32 panels, spacing, typography, toolbar, buttons, icons and visible wording. The active maze loader, engine behaviour, schemas, save paths and registered-content integration remain out of scope.

tasks.title: Implement Secondary Light Set coverage fill
tasks.description: Add a second functional light layer dependent on generated primary Decorative Lights positions, using coverage-fill placement that avoids the primary set and excluded gameplay cells. Preserve marker-only authoring until playable-preview rendering is separately approved.

tasks.title: Reopen Sound Generator popup for visual-only polish
tasks.description: After a short modal/control/preview smoke test, allow only popup/card layout, spacing, typography, control readability and visual accessibility changes. Exclude project-folder recipe save, asset-index registration, JSON fallback and caller assignment integration.

tasks.title: Validate active V1.35 integration before more work
tasks.description: Validate Step 5 layout and ownership, Save Draft/Save Project/Finish/Mark Task Ready semantics, connected object file/index update in a disposable project, browser recovery, provisional frame handling and the shared Sound Generator callback assigning only registered asset IDs.

tasks.title: Verify Creation Guide wrapper debt and starter package alignment
tasks.description: Review current app-bootstrap/project-folder setup ownership and verify that connected starter creation and ZIP/package fallback align with the canonical starter schema. Do not rely on abandoned PR #20 as live implementation.

tasks.title: Verify Project Editor save/export status and naming drift
tasks.description: Confirm current mixed/local draft/export behaviour, whether any direct connected-folder authoring is live, and remaining visible Project Manager terminology needing compatible migration. PR #9 remains evidence only, not an implementation base.

tasks.title: Continue Quest Builder from V1.2.12 baseline
tasks.description: Correct visible Project Manager wording during a normal versioned app edit and later align canonical connected-project Quest/Puzzle saving and puzzleId flow without copying puzzle internals. Retain active V1.2.12 style/config dependencies.

tasks.title: Create machine-readable app index
tasks.description: Maintain one platform metadata file identifying active, draft, archived, experimental and template-only apps so audits and navigation work use an explicit module list.

tasks.title: Complete honest connected-folder and draft/save-state adoption
tasks.description: Extend the shared connected-project-folder foundation app-by-app: verified owned-file read/write where appropriate, honest local-draft versus project-file status, permission handling and unsaved-navigation guard. Do not imply this is already adopted everywhere.

tasks.title: Apply common display, menu and version rules during approved UI passes
tasks.description: Check each app against the shared dark-frame, accent, title/header, Module-menu, cache/version and layout-state rules when that app is next selected for UI work. Do not execute a mass uncontrolled rewrite.

tasks.title: Create shared project reference index
tasks.description: Define and generate a project reference index allowing apps to list where assets, archetype objects, gameplay actions, FX, scenes, quests or routes are referenced.

tasks.title: Create shared Portal endpoint registry and cross-app linking contract
tasks.description: Portal is a project-wide endpoint mechanic rather than only a maze teleporter. Define connections/portal-registry.json and later integrate placing, linking, validation and build consumption across owning apps.

tasks.title: Build and validate Template Game after connected flows are real
tasks.description: Create and validate a populated reference project only after the relevant connected project read/write and cross-app ownership flows are verified. Do not confuse it with Blank Starter Project or Artifacts Adventures.
